name: Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a cast iron skillet (#5, 8-inch) with olive oil or spray with Pam.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until just combined.
4. Pour batter into the heated pan and bake for 20 minutes.
5. Cut into six medium or eight small pieces.
